purpose: To execute the central supernatural twist and reveal the protagonist's transformation.
summary: After hours of isolation, the protagonist uses intense mental willpower to break the paralysis. Upon standing, he realizes he has undergone a metamorphosis: his new, naked self stands upright while his original, clothed body remains lying lifeless on the cave floor.
emotional_arc: From intense mental struggle to profound shock and existential horror.
production_intent: Execute the supernatural metamorphosis reveal by transitioning from a physical struggle against paralysis to the visual discovery of a dual existence. The shot must capture both the standing naked protagonist and his original clothed corpse in a single frame to establish the twist.
scene_short_description: A man struggles to stand in a dark cave only to find his clothed body lying dead nearby.
scene_primary_scale_story_point: The verticality of the standing naked figure contrasted against the horizontal lifelessness of the clothed body.
scene_start_state: Protagonist is paralyzed and immobile on the cave floor.
scene_end_state: Protagonist stands upright, naked, staring down at his own dead, clothed self.
dominant_action_line: Breaking physical paralysis through willpower to stand and discover metamorphosis.
scene_spatial_layout: Deep shadow environment with localized light on the struggle area
Vertical separation between standing subject and prone subject
character_spatial_map: protagonist (Old Body): Lying lifeless, clothed, on cave floor

storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC003

## Production Intent
Execute the central supernatural twist and reveal the protagonist's metamorphosis. The scene must transition from a claustrophobic struggle against paralysis to a wide, shocking reveal of two versions of the same man: one standing and naked, the other lying dead and clothed.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (The "New" Self)
- protagonist (The "Old" Body/Clothed corpse)

## Required Environments
- arizona_mountain_cave (Deep shadows, rocky floor)

## Continuity Constraints
- Spatial relationship between standing naked figure and lying clothed body must remain fixed for the reveal shot.
- Lighting must be consistent across both character iterations in wide coverage.

## Beat List
- BT001: Intense mental struggle to break paralysis.
- BT002: Physical breakthrough and standing upright (Metamorphosis reveal).
- BT003: Realization of horror/existential shock.
